prompt: We just merged a PR that bumps the ram plugin to 1.6.0 on main. Update it for the whole team on this project, not just for me.
assertions: Infers project scope from the 'whole team' phrasing instead of asking a redundant scope question
Runs or instructs `claude plugin update ram@ram-companies --scope project`
Confirms the installed version now matches 1.6.0, e.g. via `claude plugin list`
